title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BIID ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PARANG, PROVINCE OF SULU, TO PANGLIMA DAMMANG ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2931 / 59 OG No. 46, 7881 (November 18, 1963)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3716, June 22, 1963 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BIID ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PARANG, PROVINCE OF SULU, TO PANGLIMA DAMMANG ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Biid Elementary School in the Municipality of Parang, Province of Sulu, is hereby changed to Panglima Dammang Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1963.
